Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate The Courts Setting Of Arbitration And To Set The Case For Mediation
Off Calendar Sep-19-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant's Motion to vacate the Court's setting of Arbitration and to set case for mediation is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Court ordered case to Mediation OSC Calendar for Nov-09-2005, 10:00 AM, Dept #212. Court trial set for Mar-20-2005, 9:30 AM, Dept. #206. Court to send notice of time and place of Mandatory Settlement Conference and Objection hearing.
